suggestions.title: Dedicated storage module is not wired into any deployable template
suggestions.resolution: Added infra/main.bicep to deploy dedicated data storage module and separate host storage account.

suggestions.title: Tests rely on raw string matching and can produce false positives
suggestions.resolution: Rewrote tests to compile Bicep via az bicep build and assert structured ARM JSON fields.

suggestions.title: Missing parameter constraints for storage account naming
suggestions.resolution: Added @minLength(3) and @maxLength(24) decorators to storageAccountName parameter.

suggestions.title: Preserve output contract for rosterContainerName
suggestions.resolution: Updated rosterContainerName output to full '<account>/default/<container>' format.

suggestions.title: Reduce brittleness in separation test assertions
suggestions.resolution: Replaced text literal assertions with compiled-template parameter assertions.

suggestions.title: Make test tooling dependency explicit
suggestions.resolution: Documented az+bicep dependency for storage infra tests in readme.md.
